Name: Keona Arano Spaceport
Details: Built during the Taurian settlement period, the spaceport is the hub of Coromodir's travel and trade, and was used as the original headquarters of the Aurigan Trade Partnership, until Countess Keona Arano was successful her campaign to convince the other Founding Houses to sign the agreements that would establish the Aurigan Coalition and became the first High Lady of the Aurigan Reach.
